subject: Unable to login to my account
body: Hi team, I cannot log in to my dashboard since this morning. It keeps saying invalid OTP and I need access urgently to run payroll today. Please help ASAP.

subject: Refund for duplicate charge
body: I was charged twice for invoice INV-2081, once on the 1st and once on the 2nd. Please process a refund for the duplicate charge as soon as possible.

subject: Feature request for reports export
body: It would be great if we could export monthly reports to CSV from the analytics page. Right now we have to copy-paste everything manually, which is painful.

subject: Production is down for our entire team
body: Our production environment has been down for the last 20 minutes and none of our 200 users can access the platform. This is a critical outage impacting our business. Please escalate immediately.

subject: Bug: export button crashes the app
body: Every time I click 'Export to PDF' on the invoices page, the app freezes and I have to refresh. This has been happening consistently since yesterday's update.

subject: Question about upgrading my plan
body: Hi, we're currently on the Starter plan and considering upgrading to Business. Could you tell me the pricing difference and whether we'd keep our existing integrations?

subject: How do I reset my two-factor authentication?
body: I lost access to my old phone and can't get the 2FA codes anymore. How can I reset this so I can get back into my account? Not urgent, just need it sorted this week.

subject: Really happy with the new dashboard update!
body: Just wanted to say the new dashboard redesign is fantastic, especially the new filters. One small question though - is there a way to save a filter as a default view?

subject: Still can't log in - following up
body: Following up on my earlier email, I'm still unable to log in and it's still saying invalid OTP. This is urgent, please advise.

subject: General question about data retention policy
body: Could someone point me to documentation on how long customer data is retained after account cancellation? We need this for a compliance review.
